subject: [APPC] Automatically retrieve certificates
commit_message:
[APPC] Automatically retrieve certificates

Instead of using hardcoded certificates, use certInitializer in order to
retrieve them

Issue-ID: OOM-2682
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I38eb9b478fb1b670e361ecf4c9d5b599e68efc61
